title: Introduction to Enchanting
description: Learn to enchant items for special abilities

content.text:
Enchanting

Enchanting adds special abilities to your tools, weapons, and armor.

Enchanting Setup:

  • Craft an Enchanting Table
  • Surround it with bookshelves for better enchantments
  • You need lapis lazuli and experience levels

Common Enchantments:

  • Sharpness - More sword damage
  • Protection - Reduces damage taken
  • Efficiency - Faster mining
  • Unbreaking - Items last longer
  • Mending - Repairs with experience

Enchanting Tips:

  • Higher level enchantments need more bookshelves
  • You can combine enchantments on an anvil
  • Some enchantments are mutually exclusive
  • Save your best enchantments for diamond gear

Experience Levels:

  • Gain experience by mining, killing mobs, and smelting
  • Enchanting costs experience levels
  • Higher enchantments cost more levels
content.task: Create an enchanting table and surround it with bookshelves. Try enchanting a tool.
